SNECKODOWNFALL-ACE_OF_WANDS_POWER.descri: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain [gold]Block[gold].

SNECKODOWNFALL-BLUNDER_GUARD_BLOCK_POWER: Whenever you play a card that costs [blue]3[/blue] Energy, gain [gold]Block[/gold].

SNECKODOWNFALL-CHEAP_STOCK_POWER.descrip: At the start of your turn, [gold]Muddle[/gold] the highest cost card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SNECKODOWNFALL-CHEAP_STOCK_POWER.smartDe: At the start of your turn, [gold]Muddle[/gold] the [blue]{Amount}[/blue] highest cost {Amount:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SNECKODOWNFALL-CHEAP_STOCK_POWER.title: Cheap Stock
SNECKODOWNFALL-CONSTRICTED_POWER.descrip: At the end of its turn, take damage.

SNECKODOWNFALL-VENOM_POWER.description: Whenever you apply a debuff that isn't [gold]Venom[/gold] to this enemy, it loses HP.
